Offering.title: Interactive Learning Modules
Offering.description: Engaging videos, quizzes, and AI-powered lessons tailored for rural students to make learning accessible and enjoyable.

Offering.title: Health Awareness Content
Offering.description: Easy-to-understand guides and tips on hygiene, nutrition, and well-being for students and communities.

Offering.title: Multilingual AI Assistant
Offering.description: Voice-enabled AI assistant that helps learners in local languages, powered by Amazon Bedrock and SageMaker.

Offering.title: Offline Access & Smart Downloads
Offering.description: Downloadable lessons and low-data content for schools with limited connectivity using edge computing.
